goals: Map all target audiences for the AIWF v21 launch across MENA and global markets
Identify existing brand voice signals, content gaps, and competitor positioning
Define content objectives, success metrics, and channel priorities before any production begins

acceptance_criteria.description: Audience personas documented with demographics, pain points, AIWF use cases, and preferred content formats
Content audit completed: existing .ai/ and docs/ assets catalogued with quality scores
Competitor content landscape mapped: at least 3 sovereign AI / developer tools analysed
